style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails swirl upward in delicate spirals, each particle refracting soft pastel light like prismatic dewdrops; a pearlescent petal-shaped aura pulses gently around the body in a blooming circle, radiating a warm lavender glow that shifts to pale gold at the edges; the lighting mood is a serene, ethereal blend of blush pink and moonlit silver, casting delicate, fluttering shadows like falling cherry blossoms; Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
